prose:
Method–provenance summary
• Property: atom-condensed Fukui functions (f⁺ electrophilicity, f⁻ nucleophilicity), condensed dual descriptors, and identification of the most electrophilic/nucleophilic sites for acrolein (C₃H₄O).
• Level of theory: DFT, tier ‘standard’ = B3LYP/def2-TZVP with RI-JK density fitting (PySCF backend).
• Geometry provenance: fixed input Cartesian coordinates supplied by the user in /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz; no geometry optimisation was performed — single-point energies for the neutral (N), cationic (N–1), and anionic (N+1) states were carried out on this common structure (notation: DFT//input-xyz).
• Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit or explicit solvation).
• Charge & multiplicity: neutral singlet (0, 1) for N state; cation doublet (+1, 2) and anion doublet (–1, 2) for the N±1 states, as required by the finite-difference Fukui protocol.
• Software: chemkit “fukui-reactivity” skill (PySCF 2.x under the hood).
• Convergence & integrity: all three SCF calculations converged; integrity.status = "ok", integrity.trustworthy = true.
  Warnings (verbatim):
    – sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
    – sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
    – common header present

Key numerical results (Mulliken-charge condensation, dimensionless)
• f⁺ (electrophilic attack susceptibility):
    O1 0.4014, C2 0.0223, C3 0.4340, C4 0.6423, H5 –0.1573, H6 –0.2072, H7 –0.0621, H8 –0.0734
• f⁻ (nucleophilic attack susceptibility):
    O1 0.3939, C2 0.0060, C3 0.0914, C4 0.0874, H5 0.0860, H6 0.1857, H7 0.0845, H8 0.0652
• Dual descriptor Δf = f⁺ – f⁻: O1 0.0075, C2 0.0163, C3 0.3426, C4 0.5550, H5 –0.2432, H6 –0.3929, H7 –0.1466, H8 –0.1386

Site rankings
• Most electrophilic site: carbonyl β-carbon C4 (atom index 3) with f⁺ = 0.64232102 (headline value above).
• Most nucleophilic site: carbonyl oxygen O1 (atom index 0) with f⁻ = 0.39388616.

Reproducibility

  /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpox_b016z/live.json
